response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (Dec 2014 - Jun 2015), far short of the required 5-10 years. No demonstrated experience with SQL Server/Oracle, Windows platform development, or fixed income/capital markets domain. Recent work has focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in unrelated domains.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with 15+ years of professional experience
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Excellent written communication evidenced by talks, workshops, and teaching experience
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), nowhere near the required 5-10 years
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform expertise
